svg.title: System architecture for the multimodal damage assessment pipeline
svg.desc: User submits a damage photo and a policy PDF. The photo goes to a YOLO vision model producing structured detections. The policy PDF is chunked, embedded and stored in a vector index queried by a RAG retriever. Detections and retrieved clauses are fused into a prompt for an LLM, which generates a preliminary claim report shown in a Gradio interface.
